evidence_excerpt: All patients had a good outcome without related symptoms and all of them returned to their normal activities. No epiphysiodesis, angular deformity or recurrence was observed at longest follow-up.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: All patients had a good outcome without related symptoms.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Another patient (case 7) ... presented a postoperative nervous complication.
Spontaneous nervous recovery occurred three months after surgery.
Valgus was completely and spontaneously corrected one year after surgery.
All patients had a good outcome without related symptoms and all of them returned to their normal activities.
Developed, four months after surgical excision, a calcification outside the area of total excision.

notes_on_uncertainty: Data summarizes nine DEH cases rather than a single patient. Index time approximated as diagnosis date before surgical excision. Individual long-term quality-of-life details are aggregate; specific case timelines (e.g., nerve complication, valgus correction, calcification) pertain to different patients within the series.
